case_title: FAB FIND DESIGNS LLC VS. AARON P. ADANA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-17-2017 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAB FIND DESIGNS LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FAB FIND DESIGNS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ADANA, AARON P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-17-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 SERVED JAN-12-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ADANA, AARON P.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-17-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-17-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PAB FIND DESIGNS LLC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY KATHERINE BELLACH, MANAGING MEMBER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT AARON ADANA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAB FIND DESIGNS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADANA, AARON P. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,100.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
